mapper.select: SELECT ci.CI_NO AS ciNo , ci.CI_DCLR_TYPE_CD AS ciDclrTypeCd , CASE ci.CI_DCLR_TYPE_CD WHEN 'IMPORT' THEN '수입' WHEN 'EXPORT' THEN '수출' ELSE ci.CI_DCLR_TYPE_CD END AS ciDclrTypeNm , ci.CI_DCLR_NO AS ciDclrNo , ci.TFG_NO AS tfgNo , ci.CI_STATUS_CD AS ciStatusCd , ci.CI_ISSUE_DT AS ciIssueDt , dfi.DFI_FILE_NO AS fileNo , dfi.DFI_ORG_NM AS fileName , CASE ci.CI_DCLR_TYPE_CD WHEN 'IMPORT' THEN NVL(imp.IR_CN, '-') WHEN 'EXPORT' THEN NVL(exp.ER_COMMENT, '-') ELSE '-' END AS itemName FROM CERT_INSURANCE ci LEFT JOIN IMP_RQST imp ON ci.CI_DCLR_TYPE_CD = 'IMPORT' AND ci.CI_DCLR_NO = imp.IR_NO LEFT JOIN EXP_RQST exp ON ci.CI_DCLR_TYPE_CD = 'EXPORT' AND ci.CI_DCLR_NO = exp.ER_NO LEFT JOIN TACS_FILE_MAP tfm ON ci.TFG_NO = tfm.TFM_TFG_NO LEFT JOIN DOCS_FILE_DATA dfi ON tfm.TFM_DFI_NO = dfi.DFI_FILE_NO AND dfi.DFI_DEL_YN = 'N' AND dfi.DFI_UPLOAD_STTS_CD = 'DONE' WHERE ci.CI_STATUS_CD IN ('ISSUED', 'CERT_ISSUED', 'CERT_REISSUED') AND ( imp.IR_OWR_ID = #{owrId} OR exp.ER_OWR_ID = #{owrId} ) ORDER BY ci.CI_ISSUE_DT DESC, ci.CI_NO DESC
